content.situation: 员工发现电脑无法连接网络，向IT支持求助
content.speakerText: Hi, I can't get online at all. The Wi-Fi icon is grayed out.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我完全上不了网，Wi-Fi图标是灰色的。
